senses.definition_en: pleasing to look at; attractive, especially in a visually striking way

examples.en: The sunset over the mountains was truly beautiful.
examples.fa: غروب آفتاب روی کوه‌ها واقعاً زیبا بود.

examples.en: She wore a beautiful red dress to the party.
examples.fa: او یک لباس قرمز زیبا به مهمانی پوشید.

senses.definition_en: (of an experience, quality, or performance) very pleasing or satisfying

examples.en: It was a beautiful performance by the young pianist.
examples.fa: این اجرای دلنشینی از سوی پیانیست جوان بود.

notes: In everyday speech, "beautiful" usually suggests a higher degree of attractiveness than the more casual words "pretty" or "nice".
